section_miscategorizations.text: I will also schedule a physical therapy consultation to address the right upper quadrant tenderness.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Physical therapy is not a typical intervention for localized right upper quadrant abdominal tenderness from suspected gallbladder or intra-abdominal pathology; while still technically a plan item, its wording could be misread as treating a musculoskeletal issue rather than the intra-abdominal complaint. This is a mild organizational/clinical coherence issue rather than a true section misplacement.
